intro.zh: 9 年设计工作经验，擅长 AI 设计、C 端、B 端 UI 与交互设计，熟悉多平台设计规范，能独立完成从前期规划到最终交付的全流程设计。精通 APP、小程序、H5、数据可视化及 B 端管理后台设计，拥有丰富的跨行业设计项目经验和开发协作能力。
intro.en: With over 9 years of design experience, I specialize in AI design, consumer-facing and business-facing UI/UX, interaction design, multi-platform design systems, and end-to-end delivery from planning to final handoff.

manifestoIntro.zh: 我相信好的设计不是装饰。
manifestoIntro.en: I believe good design is not decoration.

workIntro.zh: 横跨 AI、移动产品、设计系统与数据体验。
workIntro.en: Across AI, mobile, design systems, and data experiences.

bio.zh:
9 年设计工作经验，擅长 AI 设计、C 端、B 端 UI 与交互设计，熟悉多平台设计规范，能独立完成从前期规划到最终交付的全流程设计。精通 APP、小程序、H5、数据可视化及 B 端管理后台设计，拥有丰富的跨行业设计项目经验和开发协作能力。

1、设计工具：Codex、Nanobanana、ChatGpt、Gemini、Sketch、Figma、Photoshop、Illustrator、Axure RP

2、前端协作：熟悉HTML、CSS，掌握开发沟通流程

3、丰富的C端与B端设计经验，覆盖互联网、移动通信、电商等领域

4、精通跨部门协作与开发对接，具备优秀的执行力与团队合作能力。

5、摄影、剪辑、灯光布置，懂点小红书、抖音、视频号运营
bio.en:
**Concise & precise English translation:**

---

**Overview**  
9 years of design experience, specializing in AI-driven design, C-end and B-end UI & interaction design. Proficient in multi-platform design guidelines, capable of independently managing the full design process from initial planning to final delivery. Expert in APP, mini-program, H5, data visualization, and B-end admin dashboard design. Rich cross-industry project experience and strong development collaboration skills.

**1. Design Tools:** Codex, Nanobanana, ChatGPT, Gemini, Sketch, Figma, Photoshop, Illustrator, Axure RP  
**2. Front-End Collaboration:** Familiar with HTML & CSS; proficient in development communication workflows.  
**3. Extensive C-end & B-end design experience** across internet, mobile communications, e-commerce, and more.  
**4. Skilled in cross-functional collaboration and developer handoff**, with strong execution and teamwork abilities.  
**5. Photography, video editing, lighting setup**, plus a working knowledge of Xiaohongshu, Douyin, and WeChat Channels operations.

aboutHeadline.en: A strategist’s mind. A maker’s heart.

description.en:
→ QH Dashboard App: interaction design and high‑fidelity design for network dashboards.

→ RAIS platform App / Backend Web: prototyping and UI design for network operations tools.

→ Myanmar OML Dashboard App: interaction and high‑fidelity design for data dashboards.

→ Duoping Tuitui App: prototyping and high‑fidelity design for screen‑casting software.

→ Boxiejie App: interactive prototyping and UI design for an e‑commerce platform.

→ Cloud & Network Web: web design for a resource management platform.

→ Established design guidelines for mobile and web, and optimized component libraries.

→ Collaborated closely with R&D teams to ensure efficient delivery and continuously improve user experience.

summary.zh: AI 工具、生成式视觉、智能产品体验与自动化设计流程相关项目。
summary.en: Making AI workflows legible, controllable, and reusable for cross-functional teams.

projects.externalUrl: AI 工具、生成式视觉、智能产品体验与自动化设计流程相关项目。

title.zh: AI 很强，但过程像一个黑盒。

body.zh: 团队需要的不只是一个聊天框，而是一套能理解上下文、审阅步骤并安全复用的工作方式。
body.en: Teams needed more than a chat box: they needed a way to understand context, review steps, and reuse successful work safely.

caption.zh: Cutting-edge internet operations visual design master standard, Behance / Dribbble 3D illustration style poster, C4D style, soft-light rendering, high saturation, dopamine palette, abstract art, clean minimalist background, visually fresh, youthful and cheerful, refined and delicate. Theme: Shake Off the Office Vibe — Travel Guide.

Following the standards of an internet brand-operations visual designer, create a vertical 3D recruitment poster with the theme "JOIN US · Team Recruitment · WE NEED YOU · Find Your Glow · INNOVATE COLLABORATE GROW". Off-white background, a centered stack of purple, pink and yellow 3D geometric shapes mixed with smiley balloons, a JOIN US ID badge hanging in the middle, listing 4 open roles — Creative Planning, Visual Design, Content Operations, Community Operations. Overall young, enthusiastic, designer-toy 3D clay style.

Cutting-edge internet operations visual design master standard, Behance / Dribbble 3D illustration style poster, C4D style, soft-light rendering, high saturation, dopamine palette, abstract art, clean minimalist background, visually fresh, youthful and cheerful, refined and delicate. Theme: Urban Nomad Project.

title.zh: 把提示词变成可见的系统。
title.en: Turn prompts into a visible system.

body.zh: 我将任务拆成可组合节点，让输入、判断、工具和输出都能被检查、复制与协作。
body.en: I decomposed tasks into composable nodes so inputs, decisions, tools, and outputs could be inspected, copied, and shared.

title.zh: 更快完成，也更敢于交付。

body.zh: 首轮可用性测试显示，透明的运行状态和历史版本显著降低了误操作与重复劳动。
body.en: Early usability testing showed that transparent run states and version history reduced errors and duplicated work.

summary.zh: 把长期健康管理变成温和、可持续的日常动作。
summary.en: Turning long-term health management into gentle daily action.

title.zh: 健康提醒不该带来压力。
title.en: Health reminders should not create anxiety.

body.zh: 我们重新设计了目标、记录和反馈语言，让用户关注趋势而不是失败。
body.en: We reframed goals, tracking, and feedback around progress rather than failure.

summary.zh: 为四条产品线建立共享语言与可靠的交付方式。
summary.en: A shared language and reliable delivery model across four product lines.

title.zh: 组件只是开始，协作才是产品。
title.en: Components were the start. Collaboration was the product.

body.zh: 通过令牌、组件、贡献规范和质量看板，把一致性变成团队能力。
body.en: Tokens, components, contribution rules, and quality dashboards made consistency a team capability.

summary.zh: 面向实地研究的轻量记录与洞察工具。
summary.en: A lightweight capture and synthesis tool for field research.

title.zh: 让线索在离开现场前连接起来。
title.en: Connect signals before leaving the field.

body.zh: 照片、语音、标签和参与者信息在同一条时间线上汇合。
body.en: Photos, audio, tags, and participant context converge on one timeline.

summary.zh: 帮助运营团队从大量数据中快速找到可行动信号。
summary.en: Helping operations teams find actionable signals in dense data.

title.en: From reading reports to making decisions.

body.zh: 围绕异常、影响和建议动作重组信息层级。
body.en: The hierarchy was rebuilt around anomalies, impact, and recommended action.
